title: Math Workbook Grade1
author: Deokgu Studio
description:
Confidence with numbers starts here.

This 101-page first-grade math workbook is everything a 6- to 7-year-old needs to master the foundations of arithmetic - addition, subtraction, place value, simple time and money, and beginner word problems - without tears or screen time.

Who it's for:
- 1st grade students (ages 6-7) and advanced kindergarteners
- Homeschool families following a Common Core or classical math sequence
- Parents supplementing classroom learning at home
- Tutors and after-school program coordinators

What's inside:
- 100+ pages of carefully sequenced practice: numbers to 100, addition and subtraction within 20, then within 100
- Place-value drills (tens and ones), comparing numbers, simple skip counting
- Time-telling, money basics, measurement, and shapes
- Word problems that build reading-and-math fluency at the same time
- Weekly review pages and confidence-building "I can do this" check-ins
- Large 8.5 x 11 format with kid-friendly fonts and plenty of writing space

Use it as a school-year supplement, a summer-bridge book, or a daily 15-minute habit. Built so kids can work mostly independently while parents check at the end.

Set your child up to walk into 2nd grade fearless. Order today.
